idea-plugin.name: Column Sorter
idea-plugin.description:
Overview

Column Sorter adds convenient actions to sort and restore query result columns across supported DataGrip Result views.

Key Features

  • Sort columns alphabetically (A-Z)
  • Restore the original column order
  • Keep pinned columns grouped first
  • Supports additional Result views:
    • Services Result Grid
    • in-editor results
    • table view opened in a separate tab
  • Supports transposed result views
  • Adds actions to the column header context menu in regular table view
  • Correctly handle multiple queries executed from the same console
  • Use toolbar actions or invoke commands via Find Action

Getting Started

  1. Run a query.
  2. Open any supported result view.
  3. Use Sort Columns A-Z from the toolbar or column header context menu.
  4. Use Restore Original Column Order to return to the initial order.
  5. To keep specific columns first, open File | Settings | Column Sorter and configure pinned column names.

Settings

Open File | Settings | Column Sorter

  • Show or hide toolbar buttons
  • Configure pinned column names
  • Enable pinned columns to stay first during sorting

Notes

The plugin changes only the visual order of columns in the Result Grid. It does not modify SQL queries, database schema, or stored table structure.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0 - 2026-04-13

Added

  • Added support for sorting columns in additional Result views:
    • Services Result Grid
    • in-editor results
    • table view opened in a separate tab
  • Added plugin actions to the column header context menu in regular table view
  • Added support for transposed result views

0.1.0

  • Added alphabetical sorting for result grid columns
  • Added restore of the original column order
  • Added support for pinned columns
  • Added handling for multiple queries executed from the same console
  • Added plugin settings and toolbar integration
